sql: SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.created_at, c1.user_id, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id < 785
SELECT p1.content, p1.posted_at, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 ORDER BY p1.posted_at
SELECT c1.post_id, c1.user_id, c1.id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.id > 62 LIMIT 16
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.view_count = 375
SELECT u1.email, u1.country_code, u1.is_verified FROM users AS u1
SELECT u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY u1.is_verified
SELECT u1.is_verified, u1.id, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.username <> '123'
SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at >= DATETIME('now', '-15 days') LIMIT 81
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.id, p1.content, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at >= DATETIME('now', '-5 days') LIMIT 16
SELECT p1.id, p1.posted_at, p1.view_count FROM posts AS p1 LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM users AS u1
SELECT p1.user_id, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 ORDER BY p1.posted_at
SELECT c1.created_at, c1.post_id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 ORDER BY c1.id
SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 ORDER BY f1.followee_id
SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 ORDER BY l1.post_id
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 ORDER BY u1.country_code
SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 LIMIT 36
SELECT l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id < 601
SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1
SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at >= DATETIME('now', '-11 days')
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 LEFT JOIN comments AS c9 ON p1.id = c9.post_id WHERE c9.comment_text LIKE '%a%'
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 LEFT JOIN posts AS p5 ON l1.post_id = p5.id WHERE p5.view_count = 928
SELECT u7.username, u7.signup_date, f1.follower_id, u7.country_code FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u7 ON f1.follower_id = u7.id
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 FULL JOIN likes AS l4 ON p1.id = l4.post_id
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 FULL JOIN comments AS c6 ON u1.id = c6.user_id
SELECT u5.username, p1.id, u5.id, u5.email FROM posts AS p1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u5 ON p1.user_id = u5.id
SELECT u7.signup_date, u7.id, u7.country_code, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u7 ON l1.user_id = u7.id
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 LEFT JOIN posts AS p7 ON c1.post_id = p7.id WHERE p7.id > 990
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u8 ON f1.follower_id = u8.id
SELECT u4.country_code, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u4 ON f1.follower_id = u4.id
SELECT u3.is_verified, u3.username, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u3 ON f1.follower_id = u3.id WHERE u3.id <> 614
SELECT f1.followed_at, u5.email, u5.signup_date FROM follows AS f1 INNER JOIN users AS u5 ON f1.follower_id = u5.id WHERE u5.is_verified = 0
SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u8 ON c1.user_id = u8.id WHERE u8.email = 'user86@example.com'
SELECT * FROM users AS u1 FULL JOIN posts AS p6 ON u1.id = p6.user_id
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 FULL JOIN users AS u2 ON l1.user_id = u2.id
SELECT p5.user_id, c1.comment_text, c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 RIGHT JOIN posts AS p5 ON c1.post_id = p5.id
SELECT * FROM likes AS l1 FULL JOIN users AS u7 ON l1.user_id = u7.id
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, u5.username FROM likes AS l1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u5 ON l1.user_id = u5.id WHERE u5.username LIKE '%a%'
SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 LEFT JOIN users AS u6 ON p1.user_id = u6.id
SELECT c1.created_at, c1.comment_text, u2.email, u2.id FROM comments AS c1 LEFT JOIN users AS u2 ON c1.user_id = u2.id
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.country_code LIKE '%a%') AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-25 days')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM follows AS inner_follows WHERE inner_follows.followed_at > DATETIME('now', '-28 days')) AS derived_table
SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.id = f1.follower_id AND sub_u.email = 'user62@example.com')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM follows AS inner_follows WHERE inner_follows.followee_id < 590) AS derived_table
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.liked_at, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.email = 'user67@example.com')
SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.country_code LIKE '%a%')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.email <> 'user12@example.com') AS derived_table
SELECT f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.is_verified = 0)
SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.country_code = 'test')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.id < 22) AS derived_table
SELECT c1.id AS comment1, c2.id AS comment2, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 JOIN comments AS c2 ON c1.post_id = c2.post_id AND c1.id <> c2.id
SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.username LIKE 'b%')
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.id >= 278) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.username LIKE '%c'
SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.id = f1.follower_id AND sub_u.email LIKE '%@example.com')
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.user_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id IN (SELECT sub_p.id FROM posts AS sub_p WHERE sub_p.user_id >= 494)
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM comments AS inner_comments WHERE inner_comments.id >= 726) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.id < 542
SELECT c1.id AS comment1, c2.id AS comment2, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 JOIN comments AS c2 ON c1.post_id = c2.post_id AND c1.id <> c2.id LIMIT 20
SELECT u1.username AS user1, u2.username AS user2, u1.country_code FROM users AS u1 JOIN users AS u2 ON u1.country_code = u2.country_code AND u1.id <> u2.id
SELECT u1.id, u1.username, u1.email, u1.is_verified FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id IN (SELECT sub_f.follower_id FROM follows AS sub_f WHERE sub_f.followee_id < 65)
SELECT u1.username, u1.id FROM users AS u1 WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM likes AS sub_l WHERE sub_l.user_id = u1.id AND sub_l.user_id <= 96)
SELECT u1.is_verified, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.is_verified = 1 UNION ALL SELECT u2.is_verified, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.country_code LIKE '%c'
SELECT c1.post_id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id <= 927 UNION SELECT c2.post_id, c2.comment_text FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.user_id = 622 LIMIT 46

SELECT l1.post_id, l1.liked_at, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id <= 316 UNION ALL SELECT l2.post_id, l2.liked_at, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id > 545 ORDER BY post_id LIMIT 34

SELECT p1.posted_at, p1.user_id, p1.view_count, p1.content FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id < 178 UNION SELECT p2.posted_at, p2.user_id, p2.view_count, p2.content FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.posted_at < DATETIME('now', '-23 days')
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id <= 879 UNION SELECT l2.user_id, l2.post_id, l2.liked_at FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id = 843 LIMIT 25

SELECT p1.user_id, p1.posted_at, p1.id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.view_count > 107 UNION SELECT p2.user_id, p2.posted_at, p2.id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.posted_at < DATETIME('now', '-21 days') LIMIT 21
SELECT p1.id, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.view_count = 807 UNION SELECT p2.id, p2.user_id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.id <= 844 ORDER BY id LIMIT 46

SELECT u1.country_code, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code = 'test' UNION SELECT u2.country_code, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.country_code LIKE '%a%' ORDER BY country_code LIMIT 14

SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at < DATETIME('now', '-9 days') UNION SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id > 209 LIMIT 36
SELECT l1.post_id, l1.user_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at < DATETIME('now', '-2 days') UNION SELECT l2.post_id, l2.user_id, l2.liked_at FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id = 598
SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id, l1.liked_at FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id < 172 UNION ALL SELECT l2.user_id, l2.post_id, l2.liked_at FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id = 838 ORDER BY user_id
SELECT c1.user_id, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id > 174 UNION ALL SELECT c2.user_id, c2.post_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.created_at > DATETIME('now', '-27 days') ORDER BY user_id

SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at <= DATETIME('now', '-23 days') UNION ALL SELECT f2.followee_id, f2.followed_at, f2.follower_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followed_at >= DATETIME('now', '-20 days')
SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id <> 17 UNION SELECT f2.follower_id, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followee_id > 521 ORDER BY follower_id
SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id = 411 UNION SELECT f2.followee_id, f2.follower_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.follower_id >= 173

SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id <> 863 UNION ALL SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followed_at >= DATETIME('now', '-5 days')

SELECT u1.id, u1.country_code, u1.email, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.email <> 'user19@example.com' UNION SELECT u2.id, u2.country_code, u2.email, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.id < 884 ORDER BY id

SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.id, c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.post_id <> 381 UNION ALL SELECT c2.comment_text, c2.id, c2.user_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.user_id <> 978 ORDER BY comment_text
